goal: Remove the card 'glow' aura from reading results (part of the reversed-art retirement, #8)
done: Deleted the reversed cool-violet glow + upright warm-gold glow (box-shadow auras + keyframes + reduced-motion rules) on .card-art-img. Cards keep their base container drop-shadow. Orientation still reads from the label.
notes: SAFE half of #8. The other half — retiring reversed ART (render upright rotated 180) — NOT shipped: reversed-art files DO exist on CDN and are selected via card_id orientation encoding in asset-resolver.js (#4); swapping to upright+rotate spans every card surface + poster.js and is unverifiable here, so it needs a branch + device test. #11 (Celtic poster) pending (needs small-variant assets uploaded to CDN).
